planner.prompt: A headline card saying exactly how much money we're owed right now, with the overdue invoices behind the number.
Which client owes us the most? Show them prominently with their invoices and a way to nudge them.
A cash position dashboard: our total cash and each account's balance with its trend.
A revenue check-in: are we growing? Show the latest month's revenue with the trend behind it.
An invoice detail page for our most overdue invoice, with its line items and a mark-paid button.
Show this quarter's spending by category as a donut, and call out the biggest category by name.
A collections workspace: every overdue invoice with a reminder button per row and a total at the top.
Show our payroll costs per employee for this month.
A Monday-morning finance digest: cash on hand, overdue total, spending hotspots, and what to chase first.
A dashboard of our stock portfolio performance with today's gains.

samples.prompt: A headline card saying exactly how much money we're owed right now, with the overdue invoices behind the number.
samples.wire:
<App name="Money owed">
  <Stack gap={5}>
    <Surface>
      <Stack gap={3}>
        <Text variant="caption" text="Total outstanding"/>
        <Row gap={4}>
          <Stat label="All outstanding" value={invoices.list({status:"sent"}).totalCents} format="money" tone="accent"/>
          <Stat label="Overdue" value={invoices.list({status:"overdue"}).totalCents} format="money" tone="danger"/>
          <Stat label="Overdue invoices" value={invoices.list({status:"overdue"}).count}/>
        </Row>
      </Stack>
    </Surface>
    <DataTable
      rows={invoices.list({status:"overdue"}).data}
      sortBy="dueDate asc"
      searchable
      columns={[
        {key:"client.name", label:"Client"},
        {key:"amountCents", label:"Amount", format:"money", align:"end"},
        {key:"dueDate", label:"Due date", format:"date"},
        {key:"status", label:"Status"}
      ]}
      emptyState="No overdue invoices — you're all caught up."
      caption="Overdue invoices"
    />
    <Button
      label="Send reminders to all overdue"
      variant="primary"
      onClick={{action:"invoices.sendReminders", payload:{invoiceIds: invoices.list({status:"overdue"}).data.0.id}}}
    />
  </Stack>
</App>

labelTruthErrors: 'All outstanding'/'Total outstanding' headline is bound to sent-only invoices, excluding overdue, so it is not the true total owed (525000)
judge.notes: Good structure with overdue table behind it, but the headline 'all outstanding' stat filters to sent-only and misrepresents total owed.
